message:
fix(ci): remove unused linker env var causing ARM64 build failure

The CARGO_TARGET_AARCH64_UNKNOWN_LINUX_GNU_LINKER env var was being
set to an empty string when matrix.linker was undefined, causing:
"error: couldn't extract file stem from specified linker"

The ubuntu-24.04-arm runner is a native ARM64 machine and doesn't
need a cross-linker - removing the env var lets it use the default.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
